name_en: 《Black》25B latest accordion bag 🚩🚩🚩 flashing rhinestones 🎖️🎖️🎖️ mimi accordion bag OHANEL crystal handle accordion bag 🎹 dual-tone crystal handle is truly stunning! Retro and gorgeous, exquisite like a work of art. Double-layer accordion shape, large capacity to fit 2 phones 📱, very practical 😄. The double C buckle design is also special, giving a blingbling feeling, so exquisite and cute~ The goat leather is very unique! Feels very durable! Pairs with any outfit to elevate your sophistication. Size: 11*18.5*6cm/
